channel.title: Luanti Mods Feed
channel.description: Latest Luanti mods from Github, Gitlab, and Codeberg

item.title: breasy (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
A mod that will tell you what the wind is like at a position.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: Block League (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
S4 League inspired shooter minigame for Luanti
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: wrench (Github)
item.author: mt-mods
item.description:
mt-mods
The wrench tool allows you to pick up nodes with inventories or other metadata, such as chests, signs, drawers, machines, etc, and transport them intact to another location.
License: Other
Download ZIP

item.title: weapons_lib (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
Luanti library to easily register new weapons
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: small_fall (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080

License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: arena_lib (Gitlab)
item.author: zughy-friends-minetest
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
Luanti library working as a core manager for any minigame you have in mind
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: mtpaint (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Paint like you would in paint, but in 3d.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: vines (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Climbable vines, shears to harvest them and a rope box to help you climb.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: little_lake (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Simple mod that spawns little lakes in caves near the surface and on mountains.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: CraftoPlus (Gitlab)
item.author: Mish7913
item.description:
Mish7913
Mod for Luanti games.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: Whoopsy Cushion (Gitlab)
item.author: krabNchous
item.description:
krabNchous
Adds a practical joke device (Whoopee Cushion) for your wild potty humor and hilarious fart jokes in Mineclonia game
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: register_timer (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Persistent timers for Luanti mods.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: luanti_utils (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
High level Luanti lua modding utilities that will bring your mods to the next level.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: gift_wrapped (Github)
item.author: bas080
item.description:
bas080
Wrap nodes in gift wrapping and place a ribbon ontop to show you really care.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1
Download ZIP

item.title: m7a (Gitlab)
item.author: Mish7913
item.description:
Mish7913
API for Lianti Game
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: energy_drinks (Codeberg)
item.author: Sheriff_U3
item.description:
Sheriff_U3
A mod that adds energy drinks to the luanti game engine.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: corruptionmt (Github)
item.author: TheAirplaneMan
item.description:
TheAirplaneMan
Adds the Corruption Biome from Terraria to your Minetest Worlds
License: MIT License
Download ZIP

item.title: crimsonmt (Github)
item.author: TheAirplaneMan
item.description:
TheAirplaneMan
Adds the Crimson Biome from Terraria to your Minetest Worlds
License: MIT License

item.title: at (Github)

item.description:
bas080
jQuery like wrapper for position/vector

item.title: fluid_lib (Github)

Universal Fluid API for Luanti

item.title: edu_bricks (Github)

item.description:
Rainy428
Protected nodes for classroom use in Luanti (bricks, signs, torches)
License: MIT License
Download ZIP

item.title: reset_stage (Github)
item.author: Rainy428
item.description:
Rainy428
Simple area reset mod for Luanti. Save a region with markers and restore it instantly.
License: MIT License
Download ZIP

AI chatbot integration for Luanti (Minetest) using Ollama models.

item.title: events_api (Codeberg)

item.description:
TPH
API for creating, handling, and permitting function registration calls for custom events for Luanti/Minetest

item.title: dungeonsplus (Codeberg)
item.author: Stoabrogga
item.description:
Stoabrogga
Fork of the Luanti mod "dungeonsplus" with a few customizations
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: farmtools (Codeberg)
item.author: camelia
item.description:
camelia
Based on the Scythes & Sickles mod by TestificateMods, this (WIP) mod adds various tools to make farming more convenient.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: areas_helper_tools (Gitlab)
item.author: rangeTonic
item.description:
rangeTonic
Convenience tools for Areas protection mod
License: Unknown

item.title: leads (Codeberg)
item.author: SilverSandstone
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Adds leads to Luanti for moving and tethering animals.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: exile_songs (Codeberg)
item.author: TPH
item.description:
TPH
Plays songs in the background while you play Exile :3
License: Unknown

Fork of https://github.com/minetest-mods/drawers.git
License: Unknown

item.title: alone (Codeberg)

item.description:
Codiac
A Luanti mod to disperse players around the world.
License: Unknown

item.title: itemstore_api (Codeberg)
item.author: perfect_city_game_studio
item.description:
perfect_city_game_studio
Itemstore API is a Luanti mod that exposes an API that allows placing items as entities in a node-dependent fashion.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: ejection (Codeberg)
item.author: yof
item.description:
yof
Luanti movement mod.
License: Unknown

item.title: avantisavoia (Codeberg)

item.description:
JetpackJackson
A mod for Luanti that adds various WW1-related weapons, tools, and structures.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: DrWho_Tardis (Codeberg)
item.author: Skivling
item.description:
Skivling
A Doctor Who themed Luanti mod that adds various items and nodes, including a working TARDIS. Forked from https://github.com/PiDemon/Taridis_New , which is unmaintained.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: advtrains_horntrack (Codeberg)
item.author: SilverSandstone
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Adds a track for automatically activating train horns in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: copper_pipes (Codeberg)
item.author: Codiac
item.description:
Codiac
Replaces blocks and plastic tubes in Pipeworks with copper versions
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: flamegraph_register_node (Codeberg)
item.author: Desour
item.description:
Desour
Luanti mod that should help users that are hitting the upper limit on number of registered nodes.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: epoxied_concrete (Codeberg)
item.author: somedumbguy
item.description:
somedumbguy
Luanti Mod that uses epoxy from techage to create colored concrete blocks.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: growdrygrass (Codeberg)
item.author: SilverSandstone
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Makes dry grass spread on savanna dirt in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: blockhead (Codeberg)
item.author: SilverSandstone
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Lets you put a block on your head in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: bed_rock (Codeberg)
item.author: Desour
item.description:
Desour
Luanti mod for a rock that you can use as bed
License: Unknown
